case_title: LIPSON, KENNETH A. VS RATNER, BORIS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-02-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-28-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1500. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT RATNER, BORIS RATNER, MILA RATNER, MAYAA RYMAR, ANDREY RATNER, ALEXANDER,A MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS PARENTS RATNER BORIS AND MILA SETTLEMENT BETWEEN PARTIES, NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO ANDREY RYMER FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-24-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-02-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED BECAUSE JUDGE PRO-TEM DISQUALIFIED HERSELF.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-06-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-24-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,457.29 FILED BY LIPSON, KENNETH A. AS TO DEFENDANT RATNER, BORIS RATNER, MILA RATNER, MAYAA RYMAR, ANDREY RATNER, ALEXANDER,A MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS PARENTS RATNER BORIS AND MILA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
